2605.22368.title: VeriScale: Adversarial Test-Suite Scaling for Verifiable Code Generation
2605.22368.paper_summary: As large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed for software engineering, constructing high-quality benchmarks is crucial for evaluating not just the functional correctness, but also the formal verifiability of generated code. However, existing benchmarks are limited by the quantity and quality of positive and negative test cases, leading to an overestimation of model capabilities in generating specifications and implementations. To address this, we propose VeriScale, a novel framework driven by the adversarial implementations. It consists of two stages: test-suite expansion to construct diverse and challenging test cases, and test-suite reduction to distill them into compact yet discriminative suites. While VeriScale is general, we instantiate it on Verina to construct VerinaPlus, which expands the original test suites by over 83$\times$, and VerinaLite, a lightweight 14$\times$ variant. Our experiments across eight state-of-the-art LLMs demonstrate that VerinaPlus exposes substantial model weaknesses hidden by the original benchmark, evidenced by sharp score drops on both SpecGen and CodeGen tasks, whereas VerinaLite maintains this discriminative power at a fraction of the evaluation cost. The enhanced benchmarks and source code are publicly available at https://github.com/XiaoyangLiu-sjtu/VeriScale.
2605.22368.paper_summary_zh: 隨著大型語言模型（LLMs）在軟體工程中的應用日益增多，構建高品質的基準測試對於評估生成代碼的功能正確性以及形式可驗證性至關重要。<lb/>然而，現有的基準測試受到正負測試案例的數量和質量的限制，導致對模型在生成規範和實現方面能力的高估。<lb/>為了解決這個問題，我們提出了VeriScale，一個由對抗性實現驅動的新框架。<lb/>它由兩個階段組成：測試套件擴展以構建多樣化且具有挑戰性的測試案例，以及測試套件縮減以將其提煉為緊湊但具區分性的套件。<lb/>雖然VeriScale是通用的，我們在Verina上實現了它，以構建VerinaPlus，該版本將原始測試套件擴展了超過83$\times$，以及VerinaLite，一個輕量級的14$\times$變體。<lb/>我們在八個最先進的LLMs上的實驗表明，VerinaPlus揭示了原始基準測試隱藏的模型弱點，這在SpecGen和CodeGen任務中表現為分數的急劇下降，而VerinaLite在評估成本的一小部分下保持了這種區分能力。<lb/>增強的基準測試和源代碼已公開提供於 https://github.com/XiaoyangLiu-sjtu/VeriScale。
2605.22368.author: Yifan Bai et.al.
2605.22368.authors: Yifan Bai, Xiaoyang Liu, Zihao Mou, Guihong Wang, Jian Yu, Shuhan Xie, Yantao Li, Yangyu Zhang, Jingwei Liang, Tao Luo
